role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Bougainvillea) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (walls, paths, construction materials).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain architectural and visual cues.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Albania as the ground truth. The agents provided consistent, image-grounded evidence (architecture, vegetation) that supported the correct region and country. The tournament logic was sound, correctly distinguishing Albania from its closest neighbor (Greece) based on specific construction styles.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of mountains, concrete walls, and gravel paths match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of pink flowering shrubs (Bougainvillea) and deciduous trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of unfinished concrete, cinder block walls, and wire fencing match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of architectural style matches the visual evidence.
